cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.10)

set(NITRO_MODULE_NAME complex_module)
add_library(${${NITRO_MODULE_NAME}} SHARED
    ${${NITRO_MODULE_NAME}}_bridge.g.h
    # Add your source files here
)

target_link_libraries(${${NITRO_MODULE_NAME}}
    android
    log
)
